qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_leg_seg as oi_leg_seg, t0.oi_usuario_sys as oi_usuario_sys, t0.d_usuario as d_usuario, t0.c_seguridad as c_seguridad, SEC.policy, t0.oi_leg_seg as CODE, t0.oi_leg_seg as TEXT, t0.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, t0.oi_ubicacion as oi_ubicacion, t0.oi_sujeto as oi_sujeto FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_leg_seg LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_leg_seg asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_leg_seg as oi_leg_seg, SEC.policy FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_leg_seg LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_leg_seg asc')/ROWS/ROW

template-STD_REG.name: UBI

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_leg_seg) as CNT from LEG58_SEGURIDAD Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_leg_seg={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_leg_seg,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_leg_seg,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT
SEG.oi_leg_seg as ID, EMP.c_empresa, EMP.d_empresa, SUC.c_ubicacion, SUC.d_ubicacion, SEG.oi_usuario_sys as oi_usuario_sys, SEG.d_usuario
FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD as SEG, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP, ORG03_UBICACIONES as SUC
JOIN SEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa, SEG.oi_ubicacion INNER SUC.oi_ubicacion
WHERE
SEG.oi_leg_seg in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion as ID, ORG03_UBICACIONES.c_ubicacion as COD, ORG03_UBICACIONES.d_ubicacion as DES, ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_empresa as OI_FIND, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_USER\' as POLICY FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES WHERE 1=1
{%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={%=#SOURCE:@OI_FIND%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ucase(DES),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\') or contain(ucase(COD),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\')) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and OI_FIND={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} and ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_ubicacion FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
UNION
SELECT ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion as ID, ORG03_UBICACIONES.c_ubicacion as COD, ORG03_UBICACIONES.d_ubicacion as DES, ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_empresa as OI_FIND, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_ADMIN\' as POLICY FROM ORG03_UBICACIONES WHERE 1=1
{%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={%=#SOURCE:@OI_FIND%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ucase(DES),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\') or contain(ucase(COD),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\')) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and OI_FIND={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} and ORG03_UBICACIONES.oi_ubicacion NOT IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_ubicacion FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
{%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by COD asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %}
SELECT
ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa as ID, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa as COD, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa as DES, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_USER\' as POLICY
FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS
WHERE 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={%=#SOURCE:@OI_FIND%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,\'{%=#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND%}\') or contain(COD,\'{%=#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND%}\')) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_empresa FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
UNION
SELECT
ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa as ID, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa as COD, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa as DES, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_ADMIN\' as POLICY
FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS
WHERE 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={%=#SOURCE:@OI_FIND%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,\'{%=#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND%}\') or contain(COD,\'{%=#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND%}\')) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa NOT IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_empresa FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
{%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG.Empresa.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select SEC.policy as policy, Count(ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa) as CNT from NMD_SECURITY(NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Organizacion.Empresas.EMPRESA\') as SEC, ORG03_EMPRESAS join ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa left outer SEC.Id Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} GROUP BY SEC.policy')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('{%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} SELECT LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta as ID, LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta as COD, LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta as DES, LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_empresa as PARENT, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_USER\' as POLICY
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS
WHERE LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_estado_carpeta != 11 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={%=#SOURCE:@OI_FIND%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ucase(DES),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\') or contain(ucase(COD),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\')) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
and LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_ubicacion IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_ubicacion FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
UNION
SELECT LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta as ID, LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta as COD, LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta as DES, LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_empresa as PARENT, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_ADMIN\' as POLICY
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS
WHERE LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_estado_carpeta != 11 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={%=#SOURCE:@OI_FIND%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ucase(DES),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\') or contain(ucase(COD),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\')) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
and LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_ubicacion NOT IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_ubicacion FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
ORDER BY COD asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Legales.Seguridad.LEG_SEG.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('{%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} SELECT LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta as ID, LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta as COD, LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta as DES, LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_empresa as PARENT, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_USER\' as POLICY
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS
WHERE LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_estado_carpeta != 11 and LEG01_CARPETAS.l_cerrado != 1
{%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={%=#SOURCE:@OI_FIND%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ucase(DES),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\') or contain(ucase(COD),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\')) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
and LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_ubicacion IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_ubicacion FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
UNION
SELECT LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_carpeta as ID, LEG01_CARPETAS.c_carpeta as COD, LEG01_CARPETAS.d_carpeta as DES, LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_empresa as PARENT, \'./ROLE/LEGALES_ADMIN\' as POLICY
FROM LEG01_CARPETAS
WHERE LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_estado_carpeta != 11 and LEG01_CARPETAS.l_cerrado != 1
{%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={%=#SOURCE:@OI_FIND%} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(ucase(DES),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\') or contain(ucase(COD),\'{%=upper-case(#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND)%}\')) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}
and LEG01_CARPETAS.oi_ubicacion NOT IN (SELECT LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_ubicacion FROM LEG58_SEGURIDAD WHERE LEG58_SEGURIDAD.oi_usuario_sys = \'{%=$proxy/@ETTY%}\')
ORDER BY COD asc ')/ROWS/ROW
